title: hyptis villosa
intro: Hyptis villosa, also known as False Dragonhead or Mexican Tea, is a shrubby plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hyptis villosa include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Hyptis villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in aromatherapy for its calming and relaxing effects.
